session_summary:
## Session Complete — Desktop App Phase 1 Feature Parity

This session delivered all 3 remaining Phase 1 desktop app features from the audit, completing the Phase 1 lane.

### Feature 1: Agent Configuration UI 🆕
Desktop users can now create, edit, and delete custom agents — matching TUI functionality that was previously only available via CLI.

**Files created:** dialog-manage-agents.tsx, dialog-edit-agent.tsx, settings-agents.tsx  
**Files modified:** ipc.ts (additive handlers), preload/types.ts (AgentDef + ElectronAPI), preload/index.ts (bridge), dialog-settings.tsx (agents tab), app.tsx (Window API), i18n/en.ts (17 keys)

**Capabilities:** 
- Searchable agent list grouped by source (Built-in SDK / Custom electron-store)
- Create/edit form: name, description, system prompt, model selection (from connected providers), variant, temperature, top_p, color picker (15 swatches)
- Delete custom agents with one-click
- Save button disabled when name is empty (validation)
- IPC handlers via electron-store for persistence across app restarts

### Feature 2: Context Display Enhancement 🎨
Enhanced the existing SessionContextUsage component with:
- Color-coded usage thresholds: green < 80%, yellow 80-94%, red >= 95%
- Compaction detection via sync.data.part message parts analysis
- Compacted badge (yellow dot) on the progress circle
- Tooltip shows compaction indicator with collapse icon

### Feature 3: Settings Polish 🏗️
- Agents tab added between Shortcuts and Providers (8 additive lines)
- Full dirty file preservation — no existing code restructured

### Quality Gates
- Typecheck: Zero new errors in packages/app and packages/desktop (only pre-existing errors)
- Validation: Passed with 2 non-blocking findings (both resolved)
- Critic review: 7-axis analysis completed with documented fixes
- Dirty files: All 10 prior-session files preserved untouched

### Phase 1 Status: ✅ COMPLETE
All Phase 1 features from the desktop app audit are now delivered:
1. ✅ Blocking installCli IPC bug fix (prior session)
2. ✅ Session search time-range filters (prior session)
3. ✅ MCP dialog health indicators + add/remove (prior session)
4. ✅ Keyboard shortcut hold-modifier overlay (prior session)
5. ✅ **Agent configuration UI** (this session)
6. ✅ **Context display / overflow awareness** (this session)
7. ✅ **Settings polish** (this session)

### Deferred Items (for Phase 2)
- Server-side compaction SSE integration (renderer doesn't listen to 4 backend compaction event types)
- Cross-panel settings search (General + Providers panels)
- Agent color threshold CSS enhancement
- Custom agent storage migration to server endpoint (when available)
next_steps:
## Recommended Next Steps

1. **Phase 2 — Plugin marketplace, GitHub integration, full MCP management, subagent delegation, stats dashboard**
   These are the remaining high-priority feature gaps from the audit. Highest impact is MCP full management (add/remove/configure/auth) and GitHub integration.

2. **Compaction SSE integration** — The backend emits 4 compaction event types (started/delta/ended/compacted) but the renderer doesn't listen. Wire these into the SessionContextUsage compaction indicator for real-time updates.

3. **Cross-session coordination** — Record this lane as `frozen_pending_integration` for Phase 2. The handoff artifact at docs/json/opencode/handoffs/desktop-feature-parity-handoff.v1.json contains the full state for the next session.

4. **Prepublication review** — Before pushing, run a full prepublication review loop per AGENTS.md policy to verify the boundary claims and get reviewer admission.

findings.summary: Settings dialog uses vertical Tabs with 4 categories: General, Shortcuts, Providers, Models. No search/filter.
Management dialogs use `List` component with search, groupBy, sortBy. dialog-manage-models.tsx is the pattern.
Agents loaded via sdk.app.agents() → normalizeAgentList. Agent type: name, model, variant, prompt, temperature, etc. Read-only currently.
SessionContextUsage component already exists with ProgressCircle, metrics, tooltips — context display is 95% done.
i18n keys settings.agents.title/description already exist. ShowCustomAgents toggle exists in settings.
Agent config schema in packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts: model, variant, temperature, top_p, prompt, tools, mode, hidden, color, steps, permission.

Dirty files: install-cli.ts (new), ipc.ts (additive install-cli handler), home.tsx (session search), dialog-select-mcp.tsx (MCP health), key-hint-overlay.tsx (new), layout.tsx, index.ts, sidecar.ts, server.ts, store.ts, preload/types.ts
All agent data flows through sidecar HTTP REST API, NOT Electron IPC. No IPC channels for agents.
SessionContextTab already exists with 14 stats + breakdown bar. Overflow/pressure state MISSING — no warning colors.
Backend emits 4 compaction event types but renderer listens to zero of them. Compaction SSE gap.
Settings has keyboard nav via Kobalte Tabs (ArrowUp/Down). Models has search via useFilteredList. Shortcuts has search via fuzzysort. General and Providers have NO search.
ComposerAgentControl at packages/app/src/components/prompt-input.tsx handles agent selection in the composer.
All 3 Phase 1 features implemented. 3 new files created, 7 files modified. Typecheck passes with zero new errors.
Agent config: dialog-manage-agents.tsx (search+groups), dialog-edit-agent.tsx (form), settings-agents.tsx (settings panel). IPC handlers for custom agent CRUD.
Context display: session-context-usage.tsx updated with 80%+ yellow, 95%+ red warnings, compaction detection badge.
Settings: Agents tab added between Shortcuts and Providers in dialog-settings.tsx.
Phase 1 completion documented at docs/json/opencode/documentation/phase1-completion.v1.json. Lane frozen pending Phase 2 integration.
